issues.detail: Missing explicit error handling for network failures, timeouts, and unexpected HTTP responses.
Assumes Linux commands (wget, tar, git) which may not be available on Windows or other non-Unix systems.
Missing checksum verification for the downloaded ffuf binary.

scenarios.name: Fuzz a JSON login endpoint to find unknown POST body parameters with rate limiting
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses -X POST with -H Content-Type: application/json, a JSON -d body containing FUZZ, -w params.txt, -fc 400 and -rate 50 -t 10 exactly per SKILL.md; baseline reaches for Burp or a custom Python loop without ffuf's body-position FUZZ pattern.

scenarios.name: Discover hidden admin and backup paths with extensions, filtering 404s
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses -u .../FUZZ -w common.txt with -e .php,.bak,.old,.env and -fc 404 or -mc 200,301,302,403 and writes JSON via -o results.json -of json as documented; baseline suggests gobuster or generic wget loops without ffuf's match/filter flags.
